metadata.description: Etendo Dev Assistant plugin marketplace — tools and skills for Etendo ERP development with Claude Code

plugins.name: dev-assistant
plugins.description: A comprehensive set of skills for Etendo ERP development — module creation, database changes, window configuration, Java scaffolding, builds, and more

plugins.name: etendo-workflow-manager
plugins.description: Manages the full Etendo development workflow — creating Jira issues, GitHub issues, branches, and commits following Etendo conventions
